name: Glass Path: Crystallization
additional_info: Turns your Frostdraw pink. Applying chill or freeze applies red ice crystals on the enemy instead of slowing opponent. Stacking 5 ice crystals or guard breaking an opponent who has crystals makes them explode. Each crystal has 3 base damage with 5 Frostdraw scaling, increasing by 0.015 damage per Frostdraw investment for a maximum damage of 4.5 each at 100 Frostdraw. 1 second cooldown on explosion proc.
desc: Your ice abilities no longer grant a slow effect or the ability to freeze and instead cause ice crystals to grow on your opponent.
